data.body: WS-D STORY COMPLETE (D1 generalized RunRequest+finalize strategy, D2 hardened git-ref snapshot, D3 scoped ticket tool+multi-provider, D4 exact pins+structured-output retry/repair). Unblocks WS-K capstone. 22 commits. Next: WS-K (characterization tests -> reframe review ops as workflows -> code_review example + retire LangflowRunner).
